name: Yamadai Corporation
summary: Yamadai Corporation provides residential materials. Its residential materials include wood, building materials, residential equipment, plywood, etc. The company is also involved in the wood processing; anti-corrosion processing; manual drying processing; forest plantation; real estate rental; and residential buildings design, construction, and supervision businesses. Yamadai Corporation was founded in 1964 and is based in Ishinomaki, Japan.
